headline: A Look At Adaptive Biotechnologies (ADPT) Valuation After Q4 2025 Beat And New Pfizer Agreements
summary: Why Adaptive Biotechnologies Stock Is Back in Focus Adaptive Biotechnologies (ADPT) is drawing attention after fourth quarter 2025 results topped analyst expectations, supported by its Minimal Residual Disease business and new Pfizer agreements tied to T cell receptor discovery and immune data licensing. See our latest analysis for Adaptive Biotechnologies. The fourth quarter surprise and Pfizer announcements have brought Adaptive Biotechnologies back into the spotlight, with a 19.3% 7 day...
